benefits.description: Very vivid and detailed memory recall, memories flooding back - visual, auditory, olfactory. Enhanced memorization of techniques and formulas when combined with memory training.
Heightened sensory perception, food tasted different with specific ingredients more pronounced

side_effects.description: Constantly zoning out about past memories gets old after a while; effect seemed to slow down after extended use

protocol_notes: Had ADHD and was on stimulants since childhood (benzedrine, Ritalin, Evekeo). Used Semax at 1mg daily on empty stomach, weekdays on/weekends off, typically 2-4 weeks at a time (once for 8 weeks). Used before teaching/work. Tried Cerebrolysin as well. References using it before competitions with memory athletes. Semax is referenced as 'it' in context of the memory discussions, implying it is the compound being described.
